letter_excerpt: Not legal or medical advice. Draft assistance only. This is a draft for review by a person before filing. Dear Aetna Behavioral Health Utilization Management, I am writing to appeal the prior authorization denial for my inpatient medical detoxification to treat my alcohol use disorder. The determination date on my letter was May 19, 2026. I know your letter says that a less costly outpatient detox is appropriate for me, but I really feel inpatient is a much better fit.
